---
layout: cv
title: Willliam Jarman's CV
---
# William Jarman
Student, programmer, tinkerer

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="#">No website yet</a>
| <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Unusual_articles">My favorite wikipedia page</a>
</div>


## Currently
Pursing higher education at BYU Idaho

### Specialized in

Javascript, HTML/CSS, C#, python


## Education

`BYU-Idaho`
3.9 GPA
Expected graduation date: Fall 2027





<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
